stemHtml: What are the normal and official sources of meteorological information for an aircraft in flight?

options.a: VOLMET broadcast; ATIS, and from the ATS-units the TWR, APP and FIC only
options.c: VOLMET broadcast; ATIS, and from the ATS-units the FIC only
options.d: VOLMET broadcast; ATIS, and from the ATS-units the TWR only
